message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 30
skinparam BoxPadding 10

participant "uic : UIController" as uic
participant "ExtensionManager" as em
participant "extension : NetworkWorkbookSearchExtension" as ext
participant "uiExtension : UIExtensionNetworkWorkbookSearch" as uie
participant "NetworkWorkbookSearchPanel : JPanel" as panel

uic -> em : extensions=getExtensions();

loop [for Extension ext : extensions]
  uic -> ext : uiExtension=getUIExtension(this);
  create uie
  ext -> uie : new(extension, uic)
  uie -> uie : getSideBar();
  create panel
  uie -> panel : new (uic)
  uic -> uic : uiExtensions.add(uiExtension);
end

@enduml
